mechanism_narrative: Higher FEDFUNDS levels and positive 3-month changes increase equity discount rates and reduce the present value of future cash flows, predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS was 0.2 as of the latest available monthly snapshot before 2022-04-15
failure_condition: Reject if higher 3-month changes in FEDFUNDS do not produce lower 20-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests, with Rank IC above -0.03 in absolute contradiction over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When CPIAUCSL 12-month growth crosses above a high-inflation threshold, investors price more aggressive policy tightening and margin pressure, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL was 287.708 in the latest available monthly snapshot before 2022-04-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases, or if mean triggered returns are not below unconditional returns at p < 0.10.

mechanism_narrative: High CPIAUCSL inflation combined with a still-low FEDFUNDS rate signals that policy is behind the curve, forcing future repricing of rates and risk premia, which predicts negative 60-day S&P 500 returns.
evidence_refs: fact:latest available CPIAUCSL was elevated while FEDFUNDS was 0.2 before 2022-04-15
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-high and FEDFUNDS-low interaction term has a nonnegative coefficient for 60-day returns in walk-forward regressions, or if triggered returns exceed baseline returns.

mechanism_narrative: A low UNRATE combined with continued PAYEMS gains indicates a tight labor market that raises wage pressure and increases expected Fed tightening, predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses below 4% while PAYEMS 3-month change is positive
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE was 3.6 and PAYEMS was 150925.0 in the latest available monthly snapshot before 2022-04-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered tight-labor observations are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of cases or if the interaction adds no out-of-sample predictive power.

mechanism_narrative: Faster 3-month growth in RSAFS signals resilient nominal consumer demand and supports near-term revenue expectations, predicting positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS was 665726.0 in the latest available monthly snapshot before 2022-04-15
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS growth has Rank IC below 0.03 for 20-day S&P 500 returns over any 3-year rolling window, or if top-quintile RSAFS growth underperforms baseline.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO growth crosses into a strong positive range, improving production volumes signal firmer real activity and earnings momentum, predicting positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO was 104.5853 in the latest available monthly snapshot before 2022-04-15
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO-triggered observations do not have higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than nontriggered observations, or if the trigger coefficient is not positive in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: High HOUST during a rising FEDFUNDS environment signals that rate-sensitive housing activity is vulnerable to financing-cost shocks, predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS 3-month change crosses above 0.10pp and HOUST > 1600
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST was 1769.0 and FEDFUNDS was 0.2 in the latest available snapshots before 2022-04-15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint HOUST-high and FEDFUNDS-rising trigger is followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of instances or has no negative out-of-sample coefficient.

mechanism_narrative: Positive lagged GDPC1 growth indicates broad real demand expansion that supports corporate revenues and operating leverage, predicting positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:GDPC1 was 19806.29 in the latest available quarterly snapshot before 2022-04-15
failure_condition: Reject if the GDPC1 growth trigger produces nonpositive average 5-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests or if triggered returns are not higher than unconditional returns at p < 0.10.
